title: hieracium tridentatum subsp. glareosum
intro: Hieracium tridentatum subsp. glareosum, also known as the common hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium tridentatum subsp. glareosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
